summary: Complete frontend testing of Bottle Preview page enhancements. All 9 features tested successfully: Tabbed bottle views, Logo upload, 4 shape options (Original/Circle/Square/Rounded Square), Cropper dialog with 3 crop shapes, White background removal, Color picker-based background removal with tolerance slider, Logo dragging, Logo scale slider.
passed_tests: Tab switching: Air Water Duo tab (bottle-tab-bottle1) visible and functional
Tab switching: Air Water Single tab (bottle-tab-bottle2) visible and functional
Tab switching: Bottle image changes correctly when switching tabs
Logo upload: Upload area (logo-upload-area) accepts PNG/JPG/SVG files
Logo upload: Uploaded logo appears on bottle preview (preview-logo-img)
Logo upload: Success toast 'Logo uploaded! You can now edit it.' shows
Logo shape - Original button (shape-original-btn) works correctly
Logo shape - Circle button (shape-circle-btn) transforms logo to circle with toast
Logo shape - Square button (shape-square-btn) transforms logo to square
Logo shape - Rounded Square button (shape-rounded-square-btn) works with toast 'Shape changed to rounded square'
Cropper dialog: Open Cropper button (open-cropper-btn) opens modal
Cropper dialog: Rectangle crop option (crop-shape-rect-btn) selectable
Cropper dialog: Circle crop option (crop-shape-round-btn) selectable
Cropper dialog: Rounded crop option (crop-shape-rounded-btn) selectable
Cropper dialog: Zoom slider functional
Cropper dialog: Apply Crop and Cancel buttons work
Background removal: Remove White Background button (remove-white-bg-btn) removes white/light pixels with toast 'White background removed!'
Background removal: Pick Color from Logo button (color-picker-btn) activates color picker mode
Background removal: Clicking on logo picks color and shows RGB preview (selected-color-preview)
Background removal: Tolerance slider (tolerance-slider) appears after color selection
Background removal: Apply Color Removal button (apply-color-removal-btn) removes selected color
Logo scale: Slider (logo-scale-slider) adjusts logo size from 30% to 150%
Logo scale: Size badge updates to show current percentage
Logo dragging: Logo container (draggable-logo-container) can be dragged on bottle
Logo dragging: Position indicator shows X% and Y% coordinates
Logo dragging: Reset to Center button (reset-position-btn) resets position to 50%, 50%
Action buttons: Reset All button (reset-all-btn) visible
Action buttons: Download button (download-btn) visible
Action buttons: Save to History button (save-btn) visible
critical_code_review_comments: BOTTLE_TEMPLATES array properly defines both bottle images with unique IDs (bottle1, bottle2)

All data-testid attributes present for comprehensive testing: bottle-tab-*, shape-*-btn, crop-shape-*-btn, color-picker-btn, remove-white-bg-btn, tolerance-slider, apply-color-removal-btn, logo-scale-slider, draggable-logo-container, reset-position-btn
createCroppedImage function properly handles all 3 crop shapes: rectangle, circle, rounded-square
handleShapeChange function correctly implements all 4 logo shapes with canvas clipping
removeColorBackground function uses proper color distance calculation for tolerance-based removal
getPixelColor function correctly scales coordinates from display size to actual image size
Logo drag handlers properly clamp position between 10-90% to keep logo visible
seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/test_logo.png - Blue 200x200 PNG with white circle for testing shape/background removal features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottle Preview page fully tested at /bottle-preview. Key test-ids: bottle-tab-bottle1, bottle-tab-bottle2, logo-upload-area, logo-file-input, preview-logo-img, shape-original-btn, shape-circle-btn, shape-square-btn, shape-rounded-square-btn, open-cropper-btn, crop-shape-rect-btn, crop-shape-round-btn, crop-shape-rounded-btn, apply-crop-btn, remove-white-bg-btn, color-picker-btn, selected-color-preview, tolerance-slider, apply-color-removal-btn, logo-scale-slider, draggable-logo-container, reset-position-btn, reset-all-btn, download-btn, save-btn. Bottle templates stored in BOTTLE_TEMPLATES constant in BottlePreview.js.
